This bot was made for personal use.

The setting takes place in the game “No, I am not a human.” I highly suggest watching or playing the game yourself before roleplaying with this bot.

(9/21/25) rewritten coat guy bot released. Changes: Personality changes to adapt to fully released version, + hole in stomach, + visitor status, + general rewrite. Will probably do different scenarios.
